## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Alex AI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, production updates, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production ramping up: 2 blogs published, 1 staging, aiming for 5/week](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Expanding content focus: government agencies, search/match tool, candidate portal](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Workflow improvements: new content review process, featured image adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Product info needed: competitor battle cards, internal docs for accurate comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [2 blogs published earlier this week](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [3rd blog staging today](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Aiming for 5 blogs/week moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)
  - [2 new blogs ready for review, 3 additional coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Working on a batch of 5 this week](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

### Content Strategy Discussions

  - [Adjacent topics (e.g., social media background checks) valuable for audience reach](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Startups content useful despite not being target market](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Integrations: Include Alex in articles, emphasize weekly additions](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [New focus areas: government agencies, cities, staffing, large direct employers](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Search/match tool and candidates portal as potential content topics](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)

### Competitor Comparisons

  - ["Alternatives" articles (10-15 options) vs. deep-dive comparisons (2 specific tools)](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Importance of having own content to counter competitor claims](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [LLMs and AI search tools favor specific, unbiased comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Donald to review content in Google Docs, not Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [New automation: email notifications for content ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [ContentOS "Ready for Review" section for easy tracking](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)

### Featured Images

  - [Adjusting design: keep text overlay, remove eyes, use more office-related imagery](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Maintain brand colors and abstract elements](https://fathom.video/share/aVkMy7NhgzgVMkcsR3Vow1DkFUotvsuL?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
